/**
 * Command:
 *   cd college-server
 *   npm run seed
 * 
 * What happens:
 * - Clears all existing data (TRUNCATE CASCADE)
 * - Creates 1 admin user
 * - Creates 4 departments with HODs
 * - Creates 8 teachers (2 per department)
 * - Creates 16 classes (2 per teacher)
 * - Creates 160 students (10 per class)
 * - Creates 2 semesters (1 past, 1 active)
 * - Links all relationships correctly
 * - Generates marks, attendance, announcements, schedules
 * - Prints login credentials for all users
 */

// ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

/**
 * ADMIN (admin@college.com / admin123456)
 * ────────────────────────────────────────
 * ✅ View all departments
 * ✅ Manage teachers and students
 * ✅ View system-wide statistics
 * ✅ Access audit logs
 * ✅ Manage semesters
 * ✅ View all users and roles
 * 
 * TEACHER (teacher1@college.com / teacher1pass123)
 * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
 * ✅ View owned classes
 * ✅ Enter marks for students
 * ✅ Create announcements for classes
 * ✅ Mark attendance
 * ✅ View class schedules
 * ✅ Create/manage class sessions
 * ✅ See enrollment requests
 * 
 * STUDENT (student1@college.com / student1pass123)
 * ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
 * ✅ View enrolled classes
 * ✅ Request enrollment in available classes
 * ✅ View marks and grades
 * ✅ Check attendance (GitHub-style heatmap)
 * ✅ Read announcements from teachers
 * ✅ View class timetables
 * ✅ Check academic performance
 * ✅ View attendance trends
 * 
 * HOD / DEPARTMENT HEAD
 * ─────────────────────
 * HODs are assigned automatically to the first teacher in each department.
 * Login as teacher1, teacher3, teacher5, or teacher7 to access HOD features:
 * ✅ View all department classes
 * ✅ Approve/reject class enrollments
 * ✅ View department-wide statistics
 * ✅ Manage department schedules
 */

/**
 * AUTHENTICATION & AUTHORIZATION
 * ──────────────────────────────
 * • Login with all 3 roles
 * • Change password
 * • Forgot password flow (reset tokens created)
 * • Role-based access control
 * • Account activation/deactivation
 * 
 * CLASS & ENROLLMENT MANAGEMENT
 * ─────────────────────────────
 * • Teacher creates classes
 * • Student requests enrollment
 * • Teacher/HOD approves/rejects
 * • View class students
 * • 16 classes with 160 students total
 * • Status workflow: pending → approved/rejected
 * 
 * ACADEMIC FEATURES
 * ──────────────────
 * • Marks entry (internal, midterm, final)
 * • Student views grades
 * • Performance analytics
 * • Ranking by subject
 * • 1,440+ mark records
 * 
 * ATTENDANCE
 * ──────────
 * • Teacher marks present/absent
 * • Student views attendance
 * • GitHub-style heatmap (6 months)
 * • Attendance percentage per class
 * • 6,400+ attendance records
 * • Attendance-based performance
 * 
 * COMMUNICATION
 * ──────────────
 * • Teacher creates announcements
 * • Announcements scoped to classes
 * • Students see class announcements
 * • 32+ sample announcements
 * 
 * TIMETABLE / SCHEDULING
 * ──────────────────────
 * • Teacher creates class schedules
 * • Schedule with date, time, topic
 * • Mark sessions as canceled/rescheduled
 * • Students view class timetable
 * • Conflict prevention (overlapping times)
 * • 320+ sessions across all classes
 * 
 * DATA ANALYTICS
 * ───────────────
 * • Student performance trends
 * • Subject-wise analysis
 * • Class-wide statistics
 * • Attendance trends
 * • Pass/fail analysis
 * • Department metrics (HOD only)
 */

/**
 * After seeding, your database will have:
 * 
 * Users:              169 (1 admin, 8 teachers, 160 students)
 * Departments:        4 (with HOD assignment)
 * Teachers:           8 (2 per department)
 * Students:           160 (10 per class)
 * Classes:            16 (2 per teacher)
 * Subjects:           16 (variety of academic subjects)
 * Semesters:          2 (1 past, 1 active)
 * Enrollments:        160+ (status: approved/pending/rejected)
 * Marks:              1,440+ (3 exam types per student)
 * Attendance:         6,400+ (40 days per class)
 * Announcements:      32+ (class-scoped)
 * Class Schedules:    320+ (20 sessions per class)
 * 
 * All relationships are properly linked and constraints are enforced.
 */

// 7️⃣  TROUBLESHOOTING
// ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

/**
 * Problem: "Database connection failed"
 * ────────────────────────────────────
 * Solution: 
 * 1. Ensure PostgreSQL is running
 * 2. Check .env file has correct DB_HOST, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_NAME
 * 3. Run: psql -U postgres -d college_db -c "SELECT 1"
 * 
 * Problem: "Permission denied" error
 * ───────────────────────────────────
 * Solution:
 * 1. Ensure seed.js is executable (already is)
 * 2. Run from college-server directory
 * 3. Ensure Node is in PATH
 * 
 * Problem: "Tables don't exist" error
 * ────────────────────────────────────
 * Solution:
 * 1. Run migrations first: npm run migrate (or manual SQL)
 * 2. Ensure all tables from schema.dbml are created
 * 3. Check: psql -U postgres -d college_db -c "\dt"
 * 
 * Problem: Foreign key constraint violations
 * ───────────────────────────────────────────
 * Solution:
 * 1. Clear database: DELETE FROM users CASCADE;
 * 2. Run seed again: npm run seed
 * 3. Relationships are created in correct order
 */
